title: Anthropic Just Replaced Claude Code With New Claude Tag
summary: Anthropic launched Claude Tag, a team version of Claude Code that integrates into Slack, connects to company tools, and manages tasks in public channels. It replaces the older Claude Slack chatbot for team workflows and is entering a research preview phase with plans for broader rollout.
writeup: The video covers Anthropic's launch of Claude Tag, a team-oriented version of Claude Code that integrates with Slack, connects to company tools, and manages tasks in public channels. It replaces the older Claude Slack chatbot and is expanding past its initial research preview. The shift signals Anthropic moving Claude Code from an individual coding assistant toward a collaborative, enterprise-facing agent that operates inside team workflows.
